message:
fix: detect and auto-recover from Dolt read-only state in gt commands (gt-chx92)

Add gt-level read-only detection and recovery for polecat management
operations, complementing the daemon 30s health check loop.

- RecoverReadOnly(): detects read-only, restarts server, verifies recovery
- doltSQLWithRecovery(): wraps retry logic with server restart on persistent
  read-only errors
- CreatePolecatBranch/MergePolecatBranch: use recovery-aware retry
- CheckDoltHealth: attempts server recovery before failing pre-spawn check
- gt dolt recover: explicit command for immediate recovery
- gt dolt status: updated to suggest gt dolt recover

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
